# Photosynthesis balanced equation

## Short Teaching Summary
Photosynthesis balanced equation: The overall balanced chemical equation for photosynthesis is 6CO₂ + 6H₂O + Light Energy → C₆H₁₂O₆ + 6O₂. Map connection: this idea links by example_of to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.
